project.name: teevo-dev
project.description: Teevo golf club management platform with React/Vite frontends, AWS Lambda backend with DynamoDB and S3, and CloudFormation infrastructure for tournaments, bookings, clubs, and scorecards.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: README files, plans, and project documentation.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Package manifests, TypeScript configs, and environment settings.

layers.name: Frontend Core
layers.description: React application entry points, routing shell, and global styles.

layers.name: Frontend Pages
layers.description: Route-level page components for dashboard, clubs, tournaments, bookings, and admin.

layers.name: Frontend Components
layers.description: Reusable UI components including layout, auth gates, and feature panels.

layers.name: Frontend State
layers.description: React context and store modules managing application state and actions.

layers.name: API Client Layer
layers.description: HTTP client modules connecting the frontend to the Teevo backend API.

layers.name: Frontend Utilities
layers.description: Shared helpers for dates, validation, permissions, tournaments, and copy text.

layers.name: Backend API Handlers
layers.description: AWS Lambda entry points and request routing for REST API endpoints.

layers.name: Backend Domain Services
layers.description: Business logic and repository layer for users, clubs, tournaments, and bookings.

layers.name: Backend Core Libraries
layers.description: Auth, DynamoDB access, configuration, error handling, and response utilities.

layers.name: E2E Tests
layers.description: Playwright end-to-end test suites covering major application flows.

layers.name: Project Root
layers.description: Top-level repository metadata and shared configuration.

layers.name: Analysis Tooling
layers.description: Understand-Anything graph artifacts and ignore configuration.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand Teevo's purpose as a golf club management platform.

tour.title: Frontend Bootstrap
tour.description: The React app boots from main.tsx, mounts App.tsx, and wires client-side routing.

tour.title: Application Routes
tour.description: AppRoutes defines navigation between dashboard, clubs, tournaments, bookings, and admin pages.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: TeevoContext and store actions manage authenticated user state and domain mutations.

tour.title: API Client Layer
tour.description: The teevoApi client module sends HTTP requests to the backend Lambda API.

tour.title: Backend API Entry
tour.description: Lambda handler and router dispatch incoming API requests to domain services.

tour.title: Domain Services
tour.description: Repository and domain modules implement data access and business rules for Teevo entities.

tour.title: Authentication
tour.description: Auth library verifies bearer tokens and handles OAuth login flows.

tour.title: Infrastructure
tour.description: CloudFormation templates provision AWS resources for the backend and frontend stacks.

tour.title: E2E Test Coverage
tour.description: Playwright specs validate critical user flows across pages and API interactions.
